description_long: This house features a modern, multi-level design with a flat roof and extensive use of glass for large windows and sliding doors. The structure is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes, with pinkish exterior walls and white framing. The rooftop includes a garden and terrace area with greenery and outdoor seating, while the ground level offers a driveway, carport, and multiple patios. The house is surrounded by a paved driveway and wooden deck, with landscaped trees and outdoor furniture enhancing the setting. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some sections featuring floor-to-ceiling glass panels. The main entryway is accessible via a set of steps and is partially sheltered by an overhang.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat roofs, large glass windows, pink exterior walls, rooftop garden, and multiple outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, carport, and rooftop garden with visible greenery.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the driveway, outdoor patio, and the layered structure of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive wooden deck, outdoor pool, and large glass windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the rooftop terrace, secondary entry, and additional outdoor seating.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with steps, partial overhang, and large glass door
